chunks.text: Course: EE 98 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 98. Directed Group Study for Undergraduates Catalog Description: Group study of selected topics in electrical engineering, usually relating to new developments. Units: 1-4 Also Offered As: ELENG 98 Formats: Spring: 1-4 hours of directed group study per week Fall: 1-4 hours of directed group study per week Grading Basis: Pass/Not Pass Final Exam Status: No Class Schedule (Spring 2026): EE 98-14 – Mo 18:00-19:59, – Class Notes - Class will be held in the Fannie Lou Hamer Black Resource Center, Hearst Field Annex - Please fill out this form to request enrollment: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSejG0e9gTM6caSZZt5whCoHxdcDgdm-zDlDxxsQGqsFLib7Dg/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=114139371241039787399 Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
